tests.name: GET /api/domain/status
tests.details: Returns domain=bigmannentertainment.com, SES=Pending, CloudFront=configured, 7 DNS records

tests.name: GET /api/domain/dns-guide
tests.details: Returns 7 DNS records and 6 setup steps

tests.name: Security Headers
tests.details: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy all present

tests.name: robots.txt
tests.details: Properly serves robots.txt with sitemap reference

tests.name: manifest.json
tests.details: PWA manifest with Big Mann Entertainment branding, 2 icons

tests.name: POST /api/domain/ses/verify (auth)
tests.details: Returns DKIM tokens and DNS records from live AWS SES

tests.name: Frontend /admin/domain page
tests.details: Renders status cards, DNS records table, security headers section, SES verification button

notes: All domain configuration features working. SES domain verification initiated on AWS - status is Pending until DNS records are added at domain registrar.
